content:
🔁 NEXT STEP: I’ll generate your Human Design metrics now—stand by for process and refined schedule.
Continue
2/2
Thanks — this is your Human Design BodyGraph chart, and now we can extract your core design configuration to build your aligned daily rhythm.
🧬 [AA02] CORE HUMAN DESIGN SUMMARY
🔹 Type: Manifesting Generator
• Fast-moving, multi-passionate, non-linear energy.
• Needs freedom to pivot, shift, and follow curiosity.
• You generate energy through response, not initiation.
• Strategy: Respond → Then Inform → Then Act🔹 Authority: Emotional
• Best decisions come after riding your emotional wave (not in-the-moment).
• Clarity comes with time → sleep on big decisions.
• Ritualize “wait out the wave” into your day.
🔹 Profile: 3/2 (Martyr/Hermit)
• Line 3: Trial & Error → experiential learner
• Line 2: Hermit → needs solitude to restore + download
• Oscillates between public experimentation and private genius
🔹 Centers Defined:
• Sacral (Generator motor) – sustainable life-force energy
